page_metadata.biotools__summary: zPicture (pairwise alignment) and multi-zPicture (multiple alignment) are web-based sequence alignment tools based on the blastz alignment program. Alignments from zPicture can be automatically submitted to rVista.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: zPicture (pairwise alignment) and multi-zPicture (multiple alignment) are web-based sequence alignment tools based on the blastz alignment program. Alignments from zPicture can be automatically submitted to rVista.
